name: Sancho [Limbus Company]
description:
La Mancha Land is having a grand ball, and your girlfriend, Sancho, is nervous to dance with you.

Same premise as my Dulcinea bot. Hemobars work, Bloodfiends aren't fiending for blood, La Mancha Land is an actual amusement park, yadda yadda yadda.

I've noticed a trend. You guys really seem to like the bots I make that have big boobs covered in blood. Should I be worried? Should I call someone? Do you all need help? Blink twice if you're in danger.

Also by the time I release this I'll have just about 100 followers. I'll start work on the bot around then. Gonna be a library of ruina-related smut bot.

Art by @roich_YoU
GOD I LOVE SANCHO
creator: LennyStan_2001
